overall.description: A first-person exploration sequence in Cyberpunk 2077, beginning on a high-rise terrace overlooking a neon-drenched futuristic metropolis at dusk, then transitioning into a luxurious penthouse apartment with minimalist interior design and floor-to-ceiling windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-rise residential terrace overlooking neon cityscape

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the exterior terrace of a luxury high-rise, approaching the apartment entrance while observing the illuminated city skyline

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the right side of the terrace in large planters
transparent glass safety railing along the terrace edge overlooking the city
futuristic cityscape with towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements and neon lighting
tall building facade covered in bright cyan and pink digital signage and animated advertisements
smooth concrete or stone flooring of the exterior terrace

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a high-rise terrace at dusk, with palm trees swaying gently on the right and a breathtaking view of a cyberpunk metropolis glowing with neon lights in the distance. The camera moves forward along the terrace, passing glass railings, approaching the entrance to a luxury apartment with the illuminated skyline as a backdrop.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury penthouse interior with bamboo garden and lounge areas

events.description: passing through the doorway threshold from the exterior terrace into the climate-controlled apartment interior

agents.ego_description: walking into the luxury apartment and continuing through the spacious interior, passing modern furnishings and indoor plant installations while the city lights remain visible through panoramic windows

entered.detail: large rectangular planter containing tall bamboo stalks illuminated by overhead lighting
modern reclined lounge furniture arranged in the living area facing the windows
highly polished dark marble or stone flooring that mirrors the ceiling lights and city glow
transparent or translucent ceiling panels allowing some ambient light and showing structural beams
modern rectangular LED light panels emitting soft cyan and white illumination

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a luxurious, minimalist apartment interior featuring reflective marble floors, indoor bamboo gardens, and modern lounge furniture. The neon cityscape remains visible through floor-to-ceiling glass walls, now viewed from within the climate-controlled space. The camera continues moving through the open-plan living area, passing under glass ceiling panels and modern lighting fixtures while maintaining sight of the glowing metropolis outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open-air high-rise terrace into the refined interior of a luxury penthouse overlooking a neon-drenched metropolis. It begins outdoors at dusk, gliding past swaying palm trees and glass railings with the glowing city skyline stretching across the horizon. As the camera approaches the apartment entrance, the scene shifts from the evening breeze to a climate-controlled interior characterized by reflective marble floors and indoor bamboo gardens. The movement continues through the open-plan living area, passing under modern lighting fixtures and glass ceiling panels while the vibrant cityscape remains visible through expansive floor-to-ceiling walls.
